zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie於1273年8月10日出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾爾德斯利時，他的父親Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie24歲，母親Margaret de Crawford22歲。他於1296年與Margaret Mary Almour在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1307年8月24日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年34歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾笛卡爾 馬查亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie于1273年8月10日出生在苏格兰雷福福爾艾爾德斯利时，他的父亲Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie24岁，母亲Margaret de Crawford22岁。他于1296年与Margaret Mary Almour在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1307年8月24日在英国英格兰倫敦享年34岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾笛卡爾 馬查亞。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie was born on 10 August 1273, in Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie, was 24 and his mother, Margaret de Crawford, was 22. He married Margaret Mary Almour in 1296, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 24 August 1307, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Old Machar, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie est né le 10 août 1273, à Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Crawford, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mary Almour en 1296, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 24 août 1307, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Old Machar, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie am 10. August 1273 in Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie 24 und seine Mutter Margaret de Crawford 22. Er hat 1296 in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland Margaret Mary Almour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 24. August 1307 im Alter von 34 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Old Machar, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie è nato il il 10 agosto 1273 nel Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Crawford, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Mary Almour nel 1296, nel Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 24 agosto 1307, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Machar, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslieが1273年8月10日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルダースリーで生まれた時，父Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslieは24歳，母Margaret de Crawfordは22歳であった。1296年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルでMargaret Mary Almourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1307年8月24日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで34歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアオルド マチャーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie(이)가 1273년 8월 10일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 엘더슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Crawford(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1296년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 Margaret Mary Almour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1307년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 드 맥하르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1273, em Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Crawford, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mary Almour em 1296, em Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1307, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Machar, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wallace - Laird of Elderslie родился 10 августа 1273 г. в местности элдирсли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Crawford, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mary Almour в 1296 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 24 августа 1307 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности олд мачар, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
